author: y4rr
content: Decision: Build CLIP self-attention as a dedicated struct (CLIPSelfAttention) using ferrotorch_nn::standard_attention with causal=true. The diffusion crate's existing Attention struct uses unmasked softmax — cannot reuse. Will mirror BertSelfAttention's structure but: (a) pass causal=true, (b) all four projections have bias, (c) include the to_out projection inside the attention layer (since HF CLIP groups them as self_attn.{q_proj,k_proj,v_proj,out_proj}). QuickGELU: use GELU::with_approximate(GeluApproximate::Sigmoid), which is the documented x*sigmoid(1.702*x). State-dict prefix per HF: text_model.{embeddings.token_embedding.weight, embeddings.position_embedding.weight, encoder.layers.{i}.{layer_norm1, self_attn.{q_proj,k_proj,v_proj,out_proj}, layer_norm2, mlp.{fc1,fc2}}, final_layer_norm.{weight,bias}}.
